title: nxr projects document
description: Optional non-authoritative project/namespace views for list/inspect. Does not define flake apps or tasks; members must already exist as flake outputs. File: nxr.projects.json at the flake root.

schema_version.description: Major schema version. Unsupported majors must be rejected.

projects.description: Map of namespace id to project definition.

category.description: Optional category label for documentation; filtering uses app/task categories and membership lists.

apps.description: Flake app leaf names belonging to this namespace.

tasks.description: Task names belonging to this namespace.
